title: The Names of the Messenger of God 's Mules
description: Al-Harith-Ibn Sa'd-Muhammad b. 'Umar -Musa b. Muhammad b. Ibrahim999 - his father: 10°° Duldul, 1001 the Prophet's mule, was the first mule seen in Islam. It was presented to him by al-Muqawqis with a donkey called ' Uf ayr. 1002 The mule survived until the time of Mu awiyah. Al-Harith-Ibn Sa'd-Muhammad b. 'Umar-Ma'mar10O3-alZuhri: Duldul was given to the Prophet by Farwah b. 'Amr aljudhimi.1004 1 17841 Al-Harith-Ibn Sa'd-Muhammad b. 'Umar-Abu Bakr b. 'Abdallah b. Abi Sabrah1 O05-Zamil b. 'Amr: Farwah b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 09
